_comment: Copy this file to manifest.json (git-ignored) and fill in your documents. Sections: concept, strategy, market, financials, product, operations, launch, legal, deck. doc_type: 'document' (default) | 'presentation'. audience: 'board' (default) | 'investor' | 'prospect'. source.system: 'drive' | 'repo' | 'external'. For drive/repo docs, fill text_sha256 at export time (SHA-256 of normalized source text: lowercase → keep only [a-z0-9] → SHA-256). For external docs (SEC filings, press releases), omit text_sha256 — the publisher hashes the local PDF bytes.

documents.title: Executive One-Pager
documents.description: The 60-second overview of Luxury Lifestyle Vault.

documents.title: Market & Competitive Analysis
documents.description: Scottsdale luxury services market size, competitive landscape, and positioning.

documents.title: 3-Year Financial Model
documents.description: Revenue projections, unit economics, and path to profitability.

documents.title: Pitch Deck
documents.description: The Luxury Lifestyle Vault investor pitch deck.
